focus: [D4-A5/D4] feeds_design_decision is caller-supplied and defaults false; invert to deny-by-default with a checkable positive exemption token

graphEvents.label: How should pure transport be positively exempted without letting unclassified Open Design reads become design inputs?
route_open_design_resources defaults feeds_design_decision to false, so absent purpose classification becomes an exemption rather than unclassified/denied
tool_surface.md says read-only Open Design tools are safe without ceremony, but provides no positive receipt proving a read stayed pure transport
skDesignGate is a positive authorization for design-feeding use and should not also represent a pure-transport non-design exemption
Missing or malformed Open Design purpose classification must default to unclassified and may not feed design decisions
Pure transport must pass only with a checkable openDesignExemption token bound to tool, input digest, output digest, purpose, expiry, and no-design-use constraints

label: route_open_design_resources defaults feeds_design_decision to false, so absent purpose classification becomes an exemption rather than unclassified/denied
recommendation: Replace the boolean with required openDesignPurpose carrying class=unclassified|transport_exempt|design_authorized and make absent/malformed purpose deny design-use privilege.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for docs/schema lint and guarded proxy or PreToolUse replay; ADVISORY if based only on model prose.

label: tool_surface.md says read-only Open Design tools are safe without ceremony, but provides no positive receipt proving a read stayed pure transport
recommendation: Add openDesignExemption receipts for WIRE, bare_inventory, and diagnostic use, with output digests and constraints forbidding later design use.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE when tool calls and receipts are captured; ADVISORY for uncaptured mental use.

label: skDesignGate is a positive authorization for design-feeding use and should not also represent a pure-transport non-design exemption
recommendation: Keep mutually exclusive token kinds: skDesignGate authorizes design-feeding use; openDesignExemption allows transport-only reads and blocks those outputs from proof-of-application design evidence.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for token shape, expiry, and lineage checks; ADVISORY for final visual quality.

label: Missing or malformed Open Design purpose classification must default to unclassified and may not feed design decisions
Pure transport must pass only with a checkable openDesignExemption token bound to tool, input digest, output digest, purpose, expiry, and no-design-use constraints
The design path and the exemption path need different token kinds because one permits design use and the other forbids it.

direction: Use feeds_design_decision=false as the pure-transport proof
reason: False is absence of classification, not a positive exemption; it cannot prove a read stayed out of design grounding.
